<!-- GENERATED FILE — DO NOT EDIT. Source: docs/templates/skeletons/dockerfile-pipeline.txt -->

# Dockerfile — Cloud Run Job Pipeline Application

Multi-stage build: JDK 21 for compilation, Distroless for runtime. Replace all PLACEHOLDER values before use.

| Placeholder | Description |
|---|---|
| `PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT` | SBT sub-project name (e.g., bills-pipeline) |
| `PLACEHOLDER_JAR` | Assembly JAR filename (e.g., bills-pipeline-assembly-0.1.0.jar) |
| `PLACEHOLDER_MAIN` | Fully qualified main class (e.g., com.repcheck.BillsPipelineApp) |

## Stage 1: Build

```dockerfile
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk AS build

WORKDIR /app

COPY project/ project/
COPY build.sbt .

RUN sbt update

COPY . .
RUN sbt "PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT / assembly"
```

Docker layer caching: dependencies resolve separately from source, avoiding re-download on code changes.

## Stage 2: Runtime

```dockerfile
FROM gcr.io/distroless/java21-debian12

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=build /app/PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT/target/scala-3.4.1/PLACEHOLDER_JAR app.jar

ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0", "-jar", "app.jar"]
```

**Distroless rationale:** No shell/package manager (~130MB vs ~300MB JRE), minimal attack surface, Google-maintained patches. Debugging via Cloud Logging (no docker exec available).

**JVM tuning:** `-XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0` uses 75% of container memory limit; JDK 21 is container-aware by default.

**No EXPOSE:** Cloud Run Jobs are batch (run, exit). Add `EXPOSE 8080` for Cloud Run Services.

## .dockerignore

```
target/
.idea/
.bsp/
.metals/
.git/
docs/
blog/
.claude/
*.md
.github/
```
